hero.subtitle1: The complete platform to manage courts, schedules and bookings with simplicity and efficiency.

mockups.subtitle: The complete platform to manage courts, schedules and bookings with simplicity and efficiency.

features.subtitle: We develop tools so you can focus on your customer experience.

schedule.title: Schedules Grid
schedule.description: View the occupancy of all courts in a single integrated screen.

online_booking.title: Online Booking
online_booking.description: Intuitive reservation system that guarantees the time for your players.

simple_reservation.title: Simplified Reservation
simple_reservation.description: Direct and fast reservation process, without unnecessary steps.

court_control.title: Court Control
court_control.description: Manage multiple spaces, court types and regions with ease.

dashboard.title: Management Dashboard
dashboard.description: Track the total number of courts and bookings with a consolidated view in the admin panel.

continuous_access.title: Continuous Access
continuous_access.description: Your arena available for online bookings at any time of day or night.

howItWorks.title: Unbeatable Flow
howItWorks.subtitle: A direct flow, from court registration to booking control, without complexity.

step1.title: Configure your Courts
step1.description: Register your courts with name, type, region, capacity and schedule. The platform organizes everything automatically.

step2.title: Booking in Seconds
step2.description: Players access the schedules grid and book in a simple and direct way, without the need for phone calls.

step3.title: Booking Control
step3.description: Manage the status of each booking in real time. Confirm, cancel or track bookings through the admin panel.

forWho.subtitle: Whether you are an arena manager or a player looking for a court, SportsCourt offers the right tools for each profile.

managers.title: Centralize your arena's operation in a complete platform.
benefits: Management of multiple courts in a single grid
Dashboard with general view of courts and bookings
Creation and editing of courts by sport and region

users.title: Book your court quickly and without complications.
benefits: Booking times in a few clicks

finalCta.title: Ready to go professional?
finalCta.subtitle: Centralize the management of your courts and offer a professional booking experience for your players. All in one place.

courts.subtitle: Configure any sport with custom schedules. The platform adapts to your arena's profile.

padel.name: Padel
padel.description: Manage padel courts with configurable schedules and booking control.

tennis.name: Tennis
tennis.description: Support for tennis courts with custom slots by duration and capacity.

beachTennis.name: Beach Tennis
beachTennis.description: Administer beach tennis courts with online scheduling for your players.
